Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Irons]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 1''' — Irons are reinforcements that flooded in.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — Irons were hiding in the branches of a tree.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 11''' — The Irons are members of the Wei clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 12''' — Irons are enemies of Lindon and Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 12''' — Irons carry weapons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 17''' — The Irons are a group located at Mount Samara.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — Mercy gathered over two hundred Irons.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 35''' — Irons are individuals who carry spears.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 10''' — Trainees are restricted to using little more than Irons during combat practice.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
